topStories.title: The battle on the propaganda front intensifies
topStories.description: As the US and Israel battle to control the story of their war against Iran, their messaging gets harder to defend.

topStories.title: F&O Talk | Nifty breaches crucial Fibonacci retracement level; Sudeep Shah on Adani Total and 5 top weekly movers
topStories.description: Nifty fell over 5% weekly amid Iran-Israel/US tensions, with Bank Nifty and Auto leading declines. Sudeep Shah highlights key support-resistance levels, sector rotation strategies, and defensive plays in FMCG, Pharma, and CPSEs to navigate high volatility. Investors are advised to avoid bottom-fishing and wait for stabilisation signals.

topStories.title: Who is Taylor Brown? Zohran Mamdani appoints New York's first trans woman to lead new LGBTQI+ office
topStories.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani created a new NYC office of LGBTQIA+ Affairs and appointed the “brilliant” Taylor Brown as the director.

topStories.title: US partial shutdown leaves airport workers unpaid, airports turn to donations
topStories.description: On Friday, March 13, the US airport security officers missed their full paychecks as partial shutdown continues to stretch and approached one-month mark. Since the shutdown began, there has been no breakthrough in the congressional standoff that has now started to disrupt travel across the country.

topStories.title: Hamas urges Iran to halt attacks on Gulf, slams aggression on Tehran
topStories.description: The Palestinian group calls for end to Gulf attacks while supporting Tehran’s right to defend against Israel and US.

dailyNews.title: Mayawati accuses Congress of misusing Kanshi Ram's name for political gains
dailyNews.description: The Congress never gave due honour to Babasaheb Dr Bhimrao Ambedkar -- the messiah of Dalits and the principal architect of the Constitution -- nor did they ever confer upon him the title of Bharat Ratna... How can the same party now honour Kanshi Ram, questiones BSP chief Mayawati

dailyNews.title: If Congress and DMDK are given more seats, CPI(M) cannot be denied its share: Shanmugam
dailyNews.description: He said the party had already explained its stand to the seat-sharing committee of the DMK

dailyNews.title: Video: US Hammers Iran's Kharg Island, Over 90 Targets Destroyed In Strikes
dailyNews.description: The United States forces executed a large-scale precision strike on Iran's Kharg Island, its biggest oil export hub, on Friday night, the US Central Command said on Saturday.

dailyNews.title: Hamas urges key ally Iran to halt attacks on Gulf states
dailyNews.description: The Palestinian armed group also affirms Tehran's right to defend itself from "aggression" by the US and Israel.

dailyNews.title: Major UAE Oil Terminal In Flames Hours After US Strikes Iran's Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: Dark smoke was seen rising on Saturday from a major energy installation in the United Arab Emirates. This comes hours after the United States carried out strikes on Iran's Kharg Island oil hub.

dailyNews.title: Why has the US targeted Iran's Kharg Island?
dailyNews.description: The tiny island is home to one of the most critical pieces of Iran's energy infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: More than 110 people killed in Iran’s Kurdistan: Official
dailyNews.description: At least 112 killed in US-Israel attacks on Iran’s Kurdistan province, with 969 injured, local officials say.

dailyNews.title: 'Undertone' Review: An unsettling horror film that's meant to be heard
dailyNews.description: Fox News Digital reviews A24's new horror film "Undertone" starring Nina Kiri and Adam DiMarco as two paranormal podcasters. Written and directed by Ian Tuason.

dailyNews.title: Woman's alarming cancer symptoms blamed on pregnancy for years before stage 3 diagnosis
dailyNews.description: Los Angeles mom Marisa Peters had her colorectal cancer symptoms dismissed by doctors for five years before her stage 3 diagnosis. Now, she's an early intervention advocate.

dailyNews.title: Dems continue to reject GOP efforts to fund ICE in DHS fight despite terror concerns: 'That's on them'
dailyNews.description: Democrats accuse Republicans of prolonging government shutdown over ICE funding dispute, as impasse enters second month with no clear resolution in sight.

dailyNews.title: Trump's demand for colleges nationwide to fork over race data faces legal hurdle
dailyNews.description: A federal judge blocked Trump's requirement for colleges to immediately collect and turn over race data, siding — for now — with a group of Democrat attorneys general

dailyNews.title: State Department cuts fee to renounce US citizenship by 80% to $450
dailyNews.description: State Department slashes U.S. citizenship renunciation fee by 80% from $2,350 to $450, effective Friday. New rule reduces cost burden for Americans.

dailyNews.title: Democrat darling Talarico called out for making sixth-grade public students write ‘Obama memoirs’
dailyNews.description: Texas Senate candidate James Talarico is taking heat after it was discovered that he made his sixth-grade public school students write “Obama memoirs" celebrating his election.

dailyNews.title: Teens accused of plotting twisted 'blood ritual' school killing giggle in cruiser about glam shot
dailyNews.description: Lois Lippert and Isabelle Valdez were charged as adults after allegedly plotting a “blood ritual” killing at their Florida high school before another student tipped off authorities.

dailyNews.title: CBS News in transition: Who's in and who's out after a tumultuous year at the network
dailyNews.description: A look at all the personnel changes that have rocked CBS News including the appointment of editor-in-chief Bari Weiss and the exits of "60 Minutes" correspondent Anderson Cooper.

dailyNews.title: I was a doctor caring for Alzheimer’s patients. At 57, I became one. Here’s what’s next
dailyNews.description: Internal medicine doctor diagnosed with Alzheimer's at 57 shares how monoclonal antibody treatment restored his cognitive function and quality of life.

dailyNews.title: Last person to see JFK Jr. alive reveals chilling premonition about his fatal flight that night
dailyNews.description: Last witness to see JFK Jr. alive reveals concerns about fatal 1999 flight in new book. Kyle Bailey watched Kennedy board doomed plane despite weather.

dailyNews.title: Retro Jell-O shot is reinvented as high-end craft cocktail — and customers are paying up
dailyNews.description: At bars across America, Jell-O shots are making a comeback with craft spirits and elevated flavors, transforming the nostalgic party staple into sophisticated cocktails.

topStories.title: Trump's demand for colleges nationwide to fork over race data faces legal hurdle
topStories.description: A federal judge blocked Trump's requirement for colleges to immediately collect and turn over race data, siding — for now — with a group of Democrat attorneys general

topStories.title: Trump and Rubio’s Vision of War: The Art of Destroy and Deal
topStories.description: Unleashing his inner hawk, Secretary of State Marco Rubio plans President Trump’s military interventions. So far, they favor regime compliance, not change.

topStories.title: Trump’s War Alliance With Israel Is Reshaping the Middle East. But It Carries Risks.
topStories.description: President Trump is the first American leader to embrace fighting a full-fledged, joint war with Israel. Washington has tried to avoid that level of coordination in the past.

topStories.title: Justice Dept. Legal Threat Complicates Trump’s Pick for Fed Chair
topStories.description: An investigation of the Federal Reserve was thwarted on Friday, but a department appeal could reimpose an obstacle in Kevin Warsh’s path.

topStories.title: TikTok Investors Set to Pay $10 Billion Fee to Trump Administration
topStories.description: The large fee is the latest example of the White House’s inserting itself into corporate deal making in unusual and aggressive ways.

topStories.title: Kennedy Center’s President, Richard Grenell, Is Leaving After a Tumultuous Year
topStories.description: Since Richard Grenell was appointed by President Trump, the arts center has endured waves of cancellations and departures. It will soon close for lengthy renovations.

topStories.title: Is Latin America Ready to Abandon Cuba?
topStories.description: Latin America’s left saw Cuba as its lodestar. Now leaders across the spectrum are hesitant to aid a nation in the Trump administration’s cross hairs.

topStories.title: ‘This Spells Real Trouble for Republicans’
topStories.description: The Republican pollster Kristen Soltis Anderson joins E.J. Dionne Jr. and Robert Siegel to discuss Trump’s falling approval rating and what it portends for November.

topStories.title: Trump says Iran is "totally defeated" as war reaches 2-week mark
topStories.description: President Trump's comments came shortly after he said that the U.S. military had conducted "one of the most power bombing raids" on a vital Iranian oil hub.

topStories.title: How would escorting oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz work?
topStories.description: With oil markets paralyzed by the U.S.-Iran war, the Trump administration says it could escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz — a massive undertaking that experts say could already be in the preparatory stages.

dailyNews.title: From the archives: Richard Nixon addresses the 1973 energy crisis
dailyNews.description: Then-President Richard Nixon addressed the nation from the Oval Office during the 1973 energy crisis. Fueled by the Yom Kippur War, members of the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries in the Middle East banned the sale of oil to the U.S. and other countries, sharply raising gas prices for Americans as they faced their first fuel shortage since WWII.

dailyNews.title: Democrats seek clarity on Epstein accountant's statements on Trump accuser
dailyNews.description: Richard Kahn, who worked closely with Epstein for more than a decade, testified before the Oversight Committee on Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. 'obliterated' military targets on Iran's Kharg Island but didn't 'wipe out' oil infrastructure
dailyNews.description: President Trump said in a Truth Social post that he directed U.S. Central Command to execute a bombing raid that "obliterated" military targets on Kharg Island.

dailyNews.title: Did tariff dividend checks just become more likely? Economists weigh in
dailyNews.description: Months after President Donald Trump suggested sending Americans a $2,000 tariff dividend check, there's a chance households could see that stimulus in 2026.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he thinks Putin is helping Iran
dailyNews.description: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.

dailyNews.title: Trump can't 'drill, baby, drill' his way out of this Iran-inspired oil crisis: Experts
dailyNews.description: Oil prices have skyrocketed in the days since President Donald Trump's war on Iran began.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. forces have destroyed the military assets of Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: In a Truth Social post, President Trump said that the U.S. forces "obliterated" Iranian military targets on Kharg Island. The president said the island's oil infrastructure was spared in the attack, but could be struck down the road.

dailyNews.title: Some Republicans warn Trump's SAVE America Act is doomed as Senate tees up a vote
dailyNews.description: Sen. Mike Lee has an online army pressuring Republicans to pass the SAVE America Act, a sweeping election bill, that President Donald Trump declared his top priority.

dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
